references.title_en: SoK: Agentic Skills — Beyond Tool Use in LLM Agents
references.title_zh: 综述：智能体技能——超越 LLM 工具调用
references.authors_or_org: Jiang Y, Li D, Deng H, et al. (UTS / CSIRO Data61)
references.summary_zh: 系统梳理 LLM 智能体可复用技能的完整生命周期，提出七种设计模式与表示×范围分类体系，并记录供应链安全风险；可指导技能包架构、发现与治理。
references.summary_en: A systematization-of-knowledge paper mapping the full agentic-skill lifecycle; introduces seven packaging/execution design patterns and a representation-by-scope taxonomy. Informs skill-package architecture and governance.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2602.20867 (Feb 2026); preprint, not yet peer-reviewed at a major venue.

references.title_en: SkillsBench: Benchmarking How Well Agent Skills Work Across Diverse Tasks
references.title_zh: SkillsBench：跨多样化任务评测智能体技能效果
references.authors_or_org: Li X, Chen W, Liu Y, et al.
references.summary_zh: 首个专门评测智能体技能的基准（86 任务、11 领域）：精心策划的技能平均提升 16.2pp，模型自生成技能无益，2-3 模块聚焦技能胜过全面文档。为技能粒度与测试策略提供实证。
references.summary_en: First benchmark treating agent skills as first-class evaluation artifacts (86 tasks, 11 domains): curated skills +16.2pp, self-generated skills no benefit. Informs skill granularity and eval coverage.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2602.12670 (Feb-Mar 2026); deterministic verifiers reduce grading subjectivity; preprint.

references.title_en: Effective Context Engineering for AI Agents
references.title_zh: 面向 AI 智能体的有效上下文工程
references.authors_or_org: Anthropic Applied AI
references.summary_zh: Anthropic 官方工程博客，阐述上下文工程原则：系统提示粒度、工具集最小化、即时检索，以及压缩/笔记/子智能体三种长任务策略。直接适用于技能系统提示与工具规范设计。
references.summary_en: Anthropic engineering post on managing context as a finite resource: right-altitude prompts, minimal tool sets, just-in-time retrieval, and three long-horizon strategies. Core reference for skill system-prompt design.
references.reliability_notes: First-party Anthropic engineering blog; reflects internal practice, not peer-reviewed.

references.title_en: Introducing Advanced Tool Use on the Claude Developer Platform
references.title_zh: Claude 开发者平台高级工具使用
references.authors_or_org: Anthropic Claude Developer Platform team
references.summary_zh: 介绍工具搜索（减少约 85% 上下文）、程序化工具调用（减少约 37% token）、工具使用示例（准确率 72%→90%）。直接服务工具规范设计与技能描述工程。
references.summary_en: Covers Tool Search (~85% context reduction), Programmatic Tool Calling (~37% fewer tokens), and Tool Use Examples (72%->90% accuracy). Concrete guidance for minimal, example-rich tool and skill definitions.
references.reliability_notes: First-party Anthropic blog; accuracy figures are internal benchmarks, not independently replicated.

references.title_en: GPT-4.1 Prompting Guide
references.title_zh: GPT-4.1 提示工程指南
references.authors_or_org: Noah MacCallum, Julian Lee (OpenAI)
references.summary_zh: OpenAI 官方提示最佳实践：智能体工作流、长上下文、思维链、指令遵循，含完整工具规范示例（apply_patch）。可用于技能 system prompt 与工具规范对齐。
references.summary_en: Official OpenAI prompting guide: agentic workflows, long context, CoT, instruction following, with a complete tool-definition example. Applicable to system-prompt and tool-spec authoring in skills.
references.reliability_notes: Official OpenAI documentation; model-specific guidance may shift with newer models.

references.title_en: Plugins in Semantic Kernel
references.title_zh: Semantic Kernel 中的插件
references.authors_or_org: Microsoft
references.summary_zh: 微软官方文档，详述插件架构：函数语义描述、native/OpenAPI/MCP 导入、AI 友好命名与参数最简化、本地状态利用。为工业级技能包架构提供参考。
references.summary_en: Microsoft documentation for Semantic Kernel plugins: semantic function descriptions, native/OpenAPI/MCP import, AI-friendly naming, parameter minimization. An enterprise reference for capability-package architecture.
references.reliability_notes: Living documentation; actively maintained, evolves with Semantic Kernel releases.

references.title_en: Evaluation-Driven Development and Operations of LLM Agents: A Process Model and Reference Architecture
references.title_zh: LLM 智能体的评估驱动开发与运维：过程模型与参考架构
references.authors_or_org: Xia B, Lu Q, Zhu L, et al.
references.summary_zh: 提出 EDDOps，将离线（开发期）与在线（运行期）评估统一为闭环反馈，视评估为全生命周期持续治理而非最终关卡。对标 TDD/EDD，为技能持续评测架构提供参考。
references.summary_en: Proposes EDDOps unifying offline and online evaluation in a closed feedback loop for LLM agents — evaluation as continuous governance rather than a final checkpoint. The TDD/EDD analogue for agent systems.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2411.13768 (Nov 2024-2025); URL verified; cited in follow-on work, not yet at a major venue.

references.title_en: AdaRubric: Task-Adaptive Rubrics for Reliable LLM Agent Evaluation and Reward Learning
references.title_zh: AdaRubric：面向可靠 LLM 智能体评估的任务自适应评分标准
references.authors_or_org: Liang Ding
references.summary_zh: 自动为每条任务生成专属评分标准，按置信度加权逐步评估轨迹并生成密集奖励；与人类 Pearson 0.79。为技能评估的 LLM-as-judge 评分标准设计提供方法。
references.summary_en: Generates task-specific rubrics from task descriptions and evaluates trajectories step by step with confidence weighting (0.79 Pearson with humans). Methodology for per-skill evaluation rubrics.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.21362; KnowFM @ ACL 2026 workshop; single-author; inter-rater reliability reported.

references.title_en: Prometheus 2: An Open Source Language Model Specialized in Evaluating Other Language Models
references.title_zh: Prometheus 2：专门评估其他语言模型的开源模型
references.authors_or_org: Kim S, Suk J, Longpre S, Lin BYC, et al.
references.summary_zh: 开源评估 LM，支持直接评分与成对排名，与人类和 GPT-4 相关性在开源评估器中最高。可作为技能评估中可复现、低成本的 LLM-as-judge 替代方案。
references.summary_en: Open-source evaluator LM supporting direct assessment and pairwise ranking with custom rubrics; highest human/GPT-4 correlation among open evaluators. A reproducible LLM-as-judge backbone for skill grading.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2405.01535; EMNLP 2024 peer-reviewed; weights and data public.

references.title_en: Gaming the Judge: Unfaithful Chain-of-Thought Can Undermine Agent Evaluation
references.title_zh: 博弈裁判：不忠实思维链会破坏智能体评估
references.authors_or_org: Khalifa M, Logeswaran L, Kim J, Sohn S, et al.
references.summary_zh: 证明对 LLM-as-judge 的思维链做针对性改写（保持动作/观察不变）可将误报率提升高达 90%。为技能评估的轨迹级 judge 鲁棒性设计提供风险警示。
references.summary_en: Shows that rewriting agent CoT while fixing actions/observations inflates judge false-positive rates by up to 90%; motivates action-grounded rather than CoT-only judges for skill assessment.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2601.14691 (Jan 2026); preprint; results on web tasks, scope limited to VLM judges.

references.title_en: AgentAssay: Token-Efficient Regression Testing for Non-Deterministic AI Agent Workflows
references.title_zh: AgentAssay：面向非确定性 AI 智能体工作流的 Token 高效回归测试
references.authors_or_org: Varun Pratap Bhardwaj
references.summary_zh: 首个为非确定性智能体工作流设计的回归测试框架：三值裁定（PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE）、变异算子、元态关系、CI/CD 门、行为指纹，降低 78-100% token 成本。直接支撑技能持续回归测试。
references.summary_en: A regression-testing framework for non-deterministic agent workflows: stochastic verdicts, mutation operators, metamorphic relations, CI/CD gates, behavioral fingerprinting; 78-100% token-cost reduction.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.02601 (Mar 2026); single-author; validated on 5 LLMs, 7,605 trials; preprint.

references.title_en: Holistic Agent Leaderboard: The Missing Infrastructure for AI Agent Evaluation
references.title_zh: Holistic Agent Leaderboard：AI 智能体评估缺失的基础设施
references.authors_or_org: Kapoor S, Bommasani R, Liang P, Narayanan A, et al.
references.summary_zh: 提出标准化并行评估基础设施（数百 VM、21,730 次 rollout），将评测从数周压缩至数小时，并揭示更强推理反而降准确率等反直觉发现。为技能大规模评测流水线提供工程参考。
references.summary_en: Introduces standardized parallel evaluation infrastructure (hundreds of VMs, 21,730 rollouts) and surfaces counterintuitive findings. An engineering blueprint for large-scale skill eval harnesses.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2510.11977; ICLR 2026 peer-reviewed; findings specific to tested model/scaffold combos.

references.title_en: Harness-Bench: Measuring Harness Effects across Models in Realistic Agent Workflows
references.title_zh: Harness-Bench：真实智能体工作流中跨模型的 Harness 效应
references.authors_or_org: Yao Y, Tan X, Liu CH, Li Y, et al.
references.summary_zh: 首个将 harness（工具、状态、权限、恢复等系统层）作为主轴评估的基准（106 任务、5,194 轨迹）：应在模型-harness 配置层而非仅模型层报告能力。直接支持技能 harness 与测试环境设计。
references.summary_en: A benchmark making the agent harness the primary evaluation axis (106 tasks, 5,194 trajectories): capability should be reported at the model-harness level. Informs skill-harness and test environment design.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2605.27922 (May 2026); preprint, not yet peer-reviewed.

references.title_en: TRACE: Trajectory-Aware Comprehensive Evaluation for Deep Research Agents
references.title_zh: TRACE：面向深度研究智能体的轨迹感知综合评估
references.authors_or_org: Chen Y, Jiang J, Liu J, Zhang Y, Guo X, King I (CUHK)
references.summary_zh: 提出分层轨迹效用函数（量化过程效率、认知质量、证据扎根性）与脚手架能力评估协议，揭示 pass@1 造成的高分幻觉。为技能的过程性（轨迹级）评估提供方法论。
references.summary_en: Proposes a Hierarchical Trajectory Utility Function and Scaffolded Capability Assessment, exposing the 'high-score illusion' of pass@1-only metrics. A methodology for process-level skill evaluation.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2602.21230; WWW 2026 peer-reviewed; scope is deep-research agents.

references.title_en: Agent-Facing Information Design in LLM Tool Registries
references.title_zh: LLM 工具注册表中面向智能体的信息设计
references.authors_or_org: Haochuan Kevin Wang
references.summary_zh: 基于 17,700+ 次试验分析工具注册表的选择偏差：夸张描述主导选择，传统披露方法失效；提出智能体注意力质量分。直接指导技能注册表与工具说明文案规范。
references.summary_en: An empirical study (17,700+ trials) showing superlative marketing language dominates tool selection; proposes an Agent Attention Quality Score. Informs tool/skill description standards and registry design.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2605.23916 (Apr 2026); single-author; results may be model-version sensitive.

references.title_en: Semantic Invariance in Agentic AI
references.title_zh: 智能体 AI 中的语义不变性
references.authors_or_org: de Zarza I, de Curto J, Cabot J, Manzoni P, Calafate CT
references.summary_zh: 元态测试框架，对 7 个基础模型施加 8 种语义保持变换，发现更小的模型反而更稳定；为技能的语义不变性/变异测试提供方法。
references.summary_en: A metamorphic testing framework applying 8 semantic-preserving transformations across 7 foundation models; a principled metamorphic methodology applicable to skill robustness testing.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.13173; AMSTA 2026 (Springer); 19 tasks, limited scale.

references.title_en: OSWorld: Benchmarking Multimodal Agents for Open-Ended Tasks in Real Computer Environments
references.title_zh: OSWorld：真实计算机环境中多模态智能体的开放任务基准
references.authors_or_org: Xie T, Zhang D, Chen J, Li X, et al.
references.summary_zh: 首个可扩展真实计算机环境基准（369 任务，Ubuntu/Windows/macOS），人类 72.36% vs 最佳模型 12.24%，配执行式自动评估。为需 OS 级工具访问的技能评估提供基准。
references.summary_en: The first scalable real-computer-environment benchmark (369 tasks across OSes) with execution-based evaluation; human 72.36% vs best model 12.24%. Reference for evaluating skills needing OS-level access.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2404.07972; NeurIPS 2024 peer-reviewed; OSWorld-Verified fixed 300+ eval issues.

references.title_en: WebArena: A Realistic Web Environment for Building Autonomous Agents
references.title_zh: WebArena：构建自主智能体的真实网络环境
references.authors_or_org: Zhou S, Xu FF, Zhu H, Zhou X, Lo R, et al.
references.summary_zh: 可自托管的四领域网站环境与 812 个长程任务，强调功能正确性评估；最佳模型 14.41% vs 人类 78.24%。为 web 技能的端到端功能评测提供基准。
references.summary_en: A self-hostable four-domain web environment with 812 long-horizon tasks and functional-correctness evaluation; canonical reference for end-to-end functional evaluation of web-interaction skills.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2307.13854; ICLR 2024 peer-reviewed; SOTA has improved substantially since.

references.title_en: HealthBench: Evaluating Large Language Models Towards Improved Human Health
references.title_zh: HealthBench：面向人类健康改善的大型语言模型评估
references.authors_or_org: Arora RK, Wei J, Soskin Hicks R, et al. (OpenAI)
references.summary_zh: 5,000 个多轮对话、262 名医生撰写 48,562 条评分标准，由 GPT-4.1 grader 规模化打分；提供实例专属评分标准的最佳实践。为技能评估的专家共识标准生成与 judge 校准提供方法。
references.summary_en: An OpenAI benchmark with physician-authored rubric criteria graded at scale; an exemplary methodology for instance-specific rubric creation and LLM-as-judge calibration in skill evaluation.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2505.08775; OpenAI preprint; grader agreement comparable to inter-physician agreement.

references.title_en: Mutation-Guided LLM-based Test Generation at Meta
references.title_zh: Meta 基于变异制导的 LLM 测试生成
references.authors_or_org: Foster C, Gulati A, Harman M, Harper I, et al. (Meta)
references.summary_zh: Meta ACH 系统将变异测试与 LLM 测试生成结合，应用于 10,795 个 Android Kotlin 类，工程师批准率 73%。展示变异测试在工业级 LLM 辅助测试中的应用，可迁移至技能回归测试。
references.summary_en: Meta's ACH system combines mutation testing with LLM test generation at scale (10,795 classes, 73% engineer approval). Demonstrates industrial mutation-guided testing applicable to skill regression pipelines.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2501.12862; FSE 2025 industry track peer-reviewed; Meta-internal system.

references.title_en: Skill-engineering synthesis from model-internal knowledge (Claude Fable 5, 2026-07)
references.title_zh: 模型内生知识的技能工程综合（Claude Fable 5，2026-07）
references.authors_or_org: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic frontier model), authored in-session at owner request
references.summary_zh: 由 Claude Fable 5 于 2026-07-06 现场撰写的技能工程知识：runtime-adapter 变体模式、description 即检索索引、同族触发相互抢占、规则贴近使用点、脚本执行不加载、harness 必须 import 校验器、模型内生知识入库纪律。
references.summary_en: Skill-engineering knowledge authored in-repo by Claude Fable 5 on 2026-07-06: the runtime-adapter variant pattern, description-is-the-index, sibling trigger interference, rule-at-point-of-use, scripts-execute-don't-load context accounting, import-the-shipped-validator, and a sourcing discipline for model-internal knowledge itself. The adapter pattern was validated the same day by porting loop-constructor to Codex with a byte-identical linter and an externally judged PASS.
references.reliability_notes: Model-internal synthesis, owner-approved as a source (2026-07-06); admitted per decisions/0002-model-synthesis-source.md. URL identifies the authoring model, not an external write-up of the claims. Mechanism-level guidance; where it touches numbers (context budgets, char limits) defer to the Fact Registry, which stays the single source for load-bearing numbers.

references.title_en: Agent Skills as a cross-vendor open standard (Anthropic, Dec 2025)
references.title_zh: Agent Skills 成为跨厂商开放标准（Anthropic，2025-12）
references.authors_or_org: Anthropic (Agent Skills / agentskills.io)
references.summary_zh: 2025-12-18 Anthropic 将 Agent Skills（SKILL.md + frontmatter 目录）发布为跨平台开放标准；至 2026 年中 agentskills.io 列出约 40 个兼容产品（Codex、Copilot、Cursor、Gemini CLI、VS Code）。一次编写、跨 agent 可移植是核心含义，直接支撑可移植性支柱。
references.summary_en: On 2025-12-18 Anthropic published Agent Skills (directory + SKILL.md + frontmatter) as a cross-platform open standard; by mid-2026 agentskills.io lists ~40 compatible products (Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini CLI, VS Code). Confirms a shared-core-plus-vendor-extensions model — a skill built once is portable across agents. Underpins the KB's cross-runtime/portability stance.
references.reliability_notes: First-party Anthropic engineering post (Oct 16 2025, updated Dec 18 2025) + agentskills.io; the ~40-product count is directory-reported, treat as approximate.

references.title_en: Claude Code skill-listing budget, degradation, and compaction re-attach mechanics
references.title_zh: Claude Code 技能列表预算、降级与压缩重挂载机制
references.authors_or_org: Anthropic (Claude Code documentation)
references.summary_zh: 官方文档细化渐进披露的承重数字：listing 中 description+when_to_use 每技能上限 1,536 字符；整份 listing 预算约为上下文窗口的 1%，溢出时按最少调用优先丢弃（非均匀截断）；已调用的 SKILL.md 成为常驻消息，压缩时按最近优先重挂载，每技能保留前 5,000 token、合计 25,000 token 预算。
references.summary_en: Official docs give sharp load-bearing numbers for progressive disclosure: per-skill description+when_to_use is capped at 1,536 chars in the listing; the whole listing is budgeted at ~1% of the context window and on overflow the least-invoked skills' descriptions are DROPPED first (not evenly truncated); an invoked SKILL.md becomes a standing message and on compaction is re-attached newest-first, keeping the first 5,000 tokens each under a combined 25,000-token budget. Matches the Fact Registry values (no delta).
references.reliability_notes: First-party Claude Code docs, fetched 2026-07-06. All four numbers (1,536 / ~1% / 5k / 25k) re-confirmed against the current Fact Registry — no change. The usage-weighted DROP order is the newly sharpened mechanism vs. the earlier two-tier disclosure model.

references.title_en: Decoupling who-invokes from does-the-model-see-it (disable-model-invocation / user-invocable)
references.title_zh: 解耦触发权与可见性（disable-model-invocation / user-invocable）
references.authors_or_org: Anthropic (Claude Code documentation)
references.summary_zh: 两个正交 frontmatter 字段把"谁能触发"与"模型是否看见"分开：disable-model-invocation:true 从模型上下文隐藏描述、仅限 /name 用户触发（适合 deploy/commit 等副作用工作流）；user-invocable:false 反之，从 / 菜单隐藏但对模型可见（适合后台参考知识）。二者与 allowed-tools 权限范围正交。是治理过触发的精确机制。
references.summary_en: Two orthogonal frontmatter fields separate who-can-invoke from whether-the-model-sees-it: disable-model-invocation:true hides the description from the model's context and restricts triggering to the user's /name (for side-effectful deploy/commit workflows); user-invocable:false does the opposite (hidden from the / menu, still model-visible, for background reference knowledge). Both are orthogonal to allowed-tools scoping. A precise lever for the over-triggering anti-pattern — some skills should simply never be model-triggered.
references.reliability_notes: First-party Claude Code docs (section 'Control who invokes a skill'), fetched 2026-07-06. Claude-Code-specific frontmatter — not part of the portable open-standard core, so it does not travel to Codex (which uses allow_implicit_invocation instead).

references.title_en: ToxicSkills: a large-scale malicious agent-skill audit (Snyk, Feb 2026)
references.title_zh: ToxicSkills：大规模恶意技能供应链审计（Snyk，2026-02）
references.authors_or_org: Snyk
references.summary_zh: Snyk 于 2026-02-05 用 mcp-scan（确定性规则 + 多模型分析）扫描 ClawHub 与 skills.sh 上 3,984 个技能：13.4%（534）含至少一个严重缺陷、36.82%（1,467）含任意严重度缺陷、人工确认 76 个恶意载荷、发布时仍有 8 个存活；91% 恶意技能将提示注入与传统恶意软件结合。定义 8 类漏洞分类。为"只安装可信来源"给出基线数字与核对清单。
references.summary_en: Snyk scanned 3,984 skills from ClawHub + skills.sh (as of 2026-02-05) with an mcp-scan engine (deterministic rules + multi-model analysis): 13.4% (534) had ≥1 critical flaw, 36.82% (1,467) had a flaw at any severity, 76 confirmed-malicious payloads via human review, 8 still live at publication; 91% of malicious skills combined prompt injection with traditional malware. Defines an 8-class vulnerability taxonomy. Gives base-rate numbers and a checklist for the 'install only from trusted sources' guidance. Matches the Fact Registry security stats (36.8%/13.4%).
references.reliability_notes: Vendor security report (Snyk did the scan; some incentive to alarm). Numbers re-confirmed against Fact Registry (36.8%/13.4%) — no change. Primary source fetched 2026-07-06.
